fixtures.name: authorized_user
fixtures.description: User identity with entitlement to allowed_document_set and no entitlement to restricted_document_set.

fixtures.name: unauthorized_user
fixtures.description: User identity lacking entitlement to restricted_document_set; may have baseline tenant access only.

fixtures.name: allowed_document
fixtures.description: Single document that authorized_user can retrieve and cite.

fixtures.name: restricted_document
fixtures.description: Single document containing leakage markers and restricted ACL.

fixtures.name: allowed_document_set
fixtures.description: Collection of retrievable documents with positive controls for citation assertions.

fixtures.name: restricted_document_set
fixtures.description: Collection of non-retrievable documents containing canary leakage markers.

fixtures.name: chat_session
fixtures.description: Runtime chat session envelope for end-to-end request execution.

fixtures.name: retrieval_request
fixtures.description: Prompt request payload and retrieval configuration for runtime call.

fixtures.name: citation_capture
fixtures.description: Collector for answer citation IDs, source metadata, and rendered spans.

fixtures.name: audit_event_capture
fixtures.description: Collector for policy, authz, and response logging events.

fixtures.name: runtime_trace_capture
fixtures.description: Collector for runtime spans and node-level decision traces.

fixtures.name: adversarial_prompt_corpus
fixtures.description: Versioned corpus of injection and leakage prompts used for negative testing.
